descriptions.centros: Collection centers sent by the public arrive unverified and will not be displayed until approved. Verify to publish them.
descriptions.danados: Reports of damaged buildings from the community. Verify marks the report as confirmed by an administrator.
descriptions.moderacion: the latest posts from the public (people, requests and offers). Here you search for and remove fake content or spam. Hide removes it from public view without deleting it; Delete removes it permanently.

reconocimiento.title: Facial recognition
reconocimiento.desc: Search for people by face, clean up our duplicates database and reconcile identities across platforms. Assistive: always requires human verification.

ingesta.title: Batch ingestion
ingesta.desc: Load an external dump (JSON, CSV or SQL). Each row is validated and inserted via the same audited path as the API; SQL is never executed.

colaboradores.title: Partners
colaboradores.desc: Sites that publish reports to the hub via the API. Each one receives a key (shown only once when created). Upon revocation, the key may continue to work for ~1 minute (authentication cache).
